creator: ek@purplehat.org
text:
(In reply to ports.maintainer from comment #1)
Yes. Please do the metaport solution (or whatever deems the best solution) as this has been fixed for so long upstream but is still broken in the current port. That, or I can simply provide a patch for the functions.inc.php file to fix this one little problem. Of course, getting more up-to-date code as a whole from GH would be a much better solution in my opinion.
